steps.title: Pick two points on the line of best fit
steps.content:
Reading from the line drawn on the scatterplot, the line passes through approximately $(24, 10)$ on the left and $(34, 0)$ on the right.

Compute the slope: $$m = \frac{0 - 10}{34 - 24} = \frac{-10}{10} = -1$$

steps.title: Evaluate at $x = 25.5$
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 25.5$ into the equation:
$$y = -(25.5) + 34 = 8.5$$
Among the choices $6.2$, $7.3$, $8.2$, $9.1$, the closest value to $8.5$ is $8.2$.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
